source_files.pdf: Generated `specs.md` from official manufacturer URLs previously stored in `pdf.txt`
source_files.finance: Generated from live official Rivian pages

finance_snapshot.total_before_tax: Public Rivian pricing starts at $106,990 before taxes, registration, optional equipment, and local fees.
finance_snapshot.apr: Rivian does not publish a universal APR on the main R1S page; final financing depends on approved credit and lender terms.
finance_snapshot.finance_payment: Not shown as a standard finance example on the public R1S page.
finance_snapshot.finance_down_payment: Not published on the public R1S page.
finance_snapshot.lease_payment: Rivian config card shows estimated payment: $1,469/mo.
finance_snapshot.lease_term: term details not shown on the public card snapshot
finance_snapshot.due_at_signing: Not published in the visible public card snippet.
finance_snapshot.incentives: Rivian pricing and estimates can change and should be verified in the live build or purchase flow.
finance_snapshot.warranty: See Rivian's New Vehicle Limited Warranty guide for current coverage terms.
finance_snapshot.best_for: Buyers who want a higher-performance R1S without paying full Quad pricing.
finance_snapshot.financial_strengths: Occupies the performance middle ground between the mainstream Dual entries and the top-end Quad.
finance_snapshot.financial_concerns: Six-figure pricing increases monthly-payment sensitivity and reduces the addressable shopper pool.
finance_snapshot.notes: Snapshot uses Rivian U.S. live R1S pricing card on March 26, 2026.

image_strategy.note: Official Rivian R1S share image reused across current R1S configurations in this dataset pass.
